Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Continued To Aug-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim (Minor)
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Andrew C. Schwartz, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Nancy Benjamin, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Bruce Benjamin; present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $30,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $6,828.59 payable to Casper, Meadows, Schwartz & Cook.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $2,745.62
Other authorized disbursements payable directy to third parties in the total amount of $2,745.62 to Casper, Meadows, Schwartz & Cook 2121 No. California Blvd., Ste. 1020 Walnut Creek, CA 94596. (Reimbursement of case costs advanced)
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment $9,574.21
A net balance of $20,425.79 for the purchase of an annuity. (Annuity already purchased).
Order signed in open court.
